Title: Modeling the JWST MIRI Counts, Insights Into the Source Properties and Role of Dust-Obscured AGN
Authors: Edgar P. Vidal, Anna Sajina, Amber R. Banks, Matthieu Béthermin, Carl Ferkinhoff, Andreea Petric, Alexandra Pope, Jianwei Lyu, Vivian U, L. Y. Aaron Yung, Pallavi Patil
Table: KDE Contours for color-color diagrams (Figure 18)
================================================================================
Byte-by-byte Description of file: Figure_18_kde_contours.txt
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Bytes Format Units Label  Explanations
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  1- 6  F6.2   ---     z_min       Minimum redshift of bin
  8-13  F6.2   ---     z_max       Maximum redshift of bin
 15-20  A6     ---     class       Galaxy class (SFG/Composite/AGN)
 22-25  I4     ---     contour_id  Contour index
 27-34  A8     ---     x_band_num  Numerator band of x-color
 36-43  A8     ---     x_band_den  Denominator band of x-color
 45-52  A8     ---     y_band_num  Numerator band of y-color
 54-61  A8     ---     y_band_den  Denominator band of y-color
 63-71  F9.6   ---     x           log flux ratio x
 73-81  F9.6   ---     y           log flux ratio y
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Note: x = log10(S_num/S_den) for the x bands, y = log10(S_num/S_den) for y bands
